name: When Supernatural Battles Became Commonplace
original_name: 異能バトルは日常系のなかで
overview: A group of five boys and girls suddenly acquire supernatural powers. Ready to fight in galactic battles to defend human cause… they are struck by the realization that there are no wars, no conspiracies, no evils empires, no nothing in their high school life. They instead decide to idly have fun by wasting their powers away.

trailers.title: TVアニメ「異能バトルは日常系のなかで」PV第2弾
